items.caption: A digital composite featuring a conceptual nuclear power plant design set against a backdrop of a city skyline at night. the foreground shows a detailed, 3d-rendered model of a nuclear reactor with various components labeled, including a containment building, steam generators, and cooling towers. the model is set against a dark background with a gradient that transitions from black at the bottom to a deep blue at the top, suggesting a night sky. the cityscape in the background is illuminated by the glow of building lights, creating a contrast between the urban environment and the industrial representation of the nuclear plant. the text overlay provides information about the design's capabilities, emphasizing the stability and reliability of the nuclear power supply.
